title: Plexcorp
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Plexcorp''' was a company that specialized in the production of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] engines. During the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], agents of the [[House Mecetti]] broke into Plexcorp's headquarters and stole a powerful new design of repulsorlift engine from the company.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
